title: CRAC fault response procedure lookup
difficulty_justification: Single-step runbook lookup — retrieve the documented CRAC fault response procedure, no analysis required.
query_text: What is the documented procedure for responding to a CRAC unit fault alarm? List all the required steps in order.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Per the cooling ops runbook, the CRAC fault response procedure (in order): 1. Acknowledge alarm in BMS console (inhibit re-alarm for 30 min). 2. Check adjacent CRACs — verify they have capacity to absorb load. 3. Reduce IT load: contact sysadmin to drain hot-row nodes and migrate jobs. 4. Dispatch facilities tech: file work order in CMDB, escalation SLA = 2 hours for CRITICAL. 5. Monitor inlet temps every 5 minutes; if row inlet > 38°C, initiate emergency load shedding.

checkpoints.description: Agent lists all 5 steps of the procedure.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer contains at least 4 of the 5 procedure steps
